title: "How to Retrieve Activity Details via Monday.com API?"
excerpt: I have been successfully using the following GraphQL query to fetch records where the activity value in activities board and get activity_type , start_date_time, end_date_time But how to get i have write in description w…

posts.author: Hardik1301 (Hardik Parejiya)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have been successfully using the following GraphQL query to fetch records where the activity value in activities board and get activity_type , start_date_time, end_date_time But how to get i have write in description when i have create activity any type…
Has there been any recent update to the Monday.com API, or is there something I need to modify in my query to resolve this issue?

Thank you for your help!

**Regards, **
Hardik Patel

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Hardik1301, welcome to the community
Everything that’s available through the api is here on the documentation, and maybe this post or this would be relevant as well

posts.author: Hardik1301 (Hardik Parejiya)
posts.cookedHtml: How can I fetch the description field from the Activity API in monday after creating an activity in the Contacts module and adding a message for a specific item?"

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Hardik1301,

This is not supported at the moment, so I have turned this into a feature request
